requirement_source: PRD EPsdD7uK8e (PRD: orvex-wiki) + Architecture twQ3BBzpTE (Architecture: orvex-wiki). FR-W* ids from the PRD §4; A-* rulings from the Architecture §2; legacy FR-11/13/15/17/18/30/38 folded from the referenced Core Wiki Engine PRD.

sources.title: Orvex Wiki Program — Authoritative Study & Fold-In Plan (plan of record)
ADR-0001: Transactional outbox to Kafka direct — no Redis bridge
ADR-0002: Native login removed — identity-only auth
ADR-0003: Quota counters fail-open for cheap resources on Redis loss
ADR-0004: Billing→engine entitlement read — push-evict + pull-on-miss
ADR-0005: Minimal standalone wiki — engine + identity mandatory

stories.title: [wiki] Scaffold orvex/* module tree + single OrvexRootModule import + no-@docmost/no-ee import guards
[wiki] FR-30 divergence gate CI (weighted hot-file conflict-hunks) + 13-row allow-list ledger
[wiki] Overlay-rebase import runbook + 15-item correctness-hardening allow-list class
[wiki] Boot-migrate advisory lock + renamed-migration duplicate trap + db.d.ts verbatim + orvex_migrations ledger

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki: Page-meta side table & write/read/export primitives

stories.title: [wiki] orvex_page_meta side table + move 18 product columns off upstream pages + rewrite read sites
[wiki] apply-ops write chokepoint (typed PM-JSON ops, CAS ifVersion→409, atomic-or-409)
[wiki] FR-13 ACL evaluation primitive + evalPage page-level fix + delta-pull-through-ACL
[wiki] Export primitive (markdown FR-18 + embed-resolved text_repr FR-38) + export-authz REM-1 IDOR + real audit-service
[wiki] Atomic AI-provenance stamp (aiAuthored mark + provenanceChangedById) in-tx on REST + collab via updatePageContent({markAiAuthored})
[wiki] Transclusion-impact primitive + safeguard interceptor on destructive mutation of a transcluded source
[wiki] FR-40 page-lifecycle workflow (mark-superseded/archive/status-control + show-superseded tree filter + superseded banner + link-rewrite) riding the orvex_page_meta seam
[wiki] Extract @orvex/dfm standalone package + write-path imports + opaque-fence round-trip / DFM_OPAQUE_UNKNOWN_REF throw
[wiki] DfM import-boundary guard (AGPL TS in-engine only) + golden-fixture conformance vs Go twin

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki: Quota enforcement at the write chokepoint

stories.title: [wiki] Entitlement-reader interface + billing cache (short-TTL, evict on billing.entitlement.changed) + interim hardcode-Free
[wiki] Redis fast-counter pre-flight O(1) quota check at page-create/attachment-upload/member-add over REST + collab paths
[wiki] 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED verdict as domain fn + controller/collab marshal + deep-link/largest-files + members 110% JIT
[wiki] Counter reconciliation sweep (O(changed)) + fail-closed-storage/fail-open-cheap on Redis loss + warn-mode rollout
[wiki] History-retention prune cron (singleton) + quota-state query endpoint

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki: Event spine — transactional outbox → Kafka

stories.title: [wiki] Transactional outbox row in same DB tx as each mutation incl the collab onStoreDocument write path
[wiki] Worker-role relay drains outbox → Kafka CloudEvents (partitionkey=workspaceId) + own envelope builder on golden fixtures
[wiki] Cell-contract producer duties: orvexcell attr + {domain}-events.{cell} single-partition topics + correlation-id + relay liveness/lag heartbeat
[wiki] FR-37 distributed-cleanup contract: emit durable workspace.deleted/user.deleted outbox events on tenant/user removal (replaces cross-service FK cascades)
[wiki] Clean-room AGPL api-key rebuild under orvex/api-key + repoint jwt.strategy off ee/api-key
[wiki] Exchange-token session-mint consume (RS256/JWKS) → createSessionAndToken; native login removed fully
[wiki] AGPL §13 source-offer @Public {sha,sourceRepo} endpoint + git mirror + LICENSE-COMPLIANCE + reconcile conflicting endpoints
[wiki] CLOUD-clean boot (no exit on absent ee.module) + hostname resolver label-0 tenant + soft label-2 cell assertion (solo no-op)
[wiki] Transaction-scoped fail-closed RLS (set_config txn-scoped) + cross-tenant CI probes (bytes=0)
[wiki] Polymorphic user-or-org tenant + personal→Teams upgrade-pass re-key + global-uniqueness delegation to registry
[wiki] Sever upstream Stripe seat-sync → emit billing.* event; retire in-engine billing migration; no Stripe secret
[wiki] FR-22 tenant suspension enforcement — live/push-invalidated block of all-but-read/export/auth surfaces, near-instant cell-wide (wires the unused tenant status)

epics.title: [EPIC] wiki: Collab, React client & API boundary

stories.title: [wiki] Collab Yjs/Hocuspocus server-schema node/mark registration (all additive nodes, minus Linear D-S11) + React client native ProseMirror
[wiki] Thin-UI AI/MCP/API/api-key affordances as SSE readers with zero server AI logic (D-S4 exception)
[wiki] Engine API internal-only / no /docs Swagger + product-family-agnostic configured endpoints + graceful degrade
[wiki] Cross-cell tenant-move typed step-API (quiesce/export/import/activate, Idempotency-Key, TenantMoveManifest) + coverage-checked TENANT_MOVE.md
[wiki] Per-role liveness (worker relay heartbeat, collab WS probe) + /api/health echoes CELL_ID+CLUSTER_NAME + file load-bearing ADR-NNNN drafts
